name: ASHFORD HOSPITALITY TRUST INC
summary: Ashford Hospitality Trust, Inc. is a Maryland corporation and real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on the lodging and hospitality industry. The company owns and invests in hotel properties across the United States. It is externally advised by Ashford Hospitality Advisors LLC and utilizes affiliated service providers including Remington Lodging & Hospitality for hotel management and Premier Project Management for capital projects.
